title: pilosella sciadophora subsp. digenes
intro: Pilosella sciadophora subsp. digenes is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Pilosella genus, commonly known as a type of saw-wort. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella sciadophora subsp. digenes include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. This plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
